title: Google FULLY FREE Vibe-gravity (VIBE CODE 2.0): FREE & BEST!
summary: Google AI Studio added Android app generation directly in the browser, supporting Kotlin and Jetpack Compose project creation with cloud emulator preview and Web USB deployment. A new Design Variations feature generates and applies different UI layouts visually without complex prompts.
